header.headline: Templates to IR
header.subtitle: Templates describe architecture; the IR builder resolves concrete ops, dataflow, and kernels.

template.title: Template JSON
template.body: Start from architecture fields, flags, and model-family structure.

builder.title: IR1 Builder
builder.body: Map template ops into graph nodes and kernel families.

dataflow.title: Dataflow Graph
dataflow.body: Attach op ids and edge relationships so later stages stay explicit.

registry.title: Registry Match
registry.body: Resolve valid kernels from quant summaries and template flags.

ir1.title: IR1 Output
ir1.body: The emitted IR is ready for lowering without model-specific if/else code.

footer.note: This bridge matters because templates stay declarative while the compiler resolves execution details.
